header.title: Halles de Cordes-sur-Ciel 01.jpg
header.description:
Halles of Cordes-sur-Ciel, Tarn, France





 
This building is classé au titre des monuments historiques de la France. It is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the reference PA00095527 .
